Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brake part details to provide fresh source material for email content generation.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory, current pricing, and active promotions without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Uses scraped product and promotional data to generate a compelling, on-brand daily marketing email with subject line, body copy, and CTA.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional marketing copy at scale every day, eliminating hours of manual copywriting and maintaining consistent brand voice.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email content and deploys it to the configured R1 Concepts contact list via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily email deployment to the full contact list, driving consistent customer engagement and repeat purchase opportunities.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current Dynamic Friction Company product pages, friction materials, and promotional content to source email material.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content accurate and timely by pulling directly from live product data without manual research.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily DFC-branded marketing email including subject line, body copy, and CTA based on the scraped website content.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers daily professional email campaigns for DFC without requiring a dedicated copywriter, saving hours per week.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated DFC email to the target contact list using the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures consistent daily outreach to DFC customers, supporting pipeline engagement and brand awareness at zero marginal effort.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, ticket metadata, and associated contact history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests for AI processing, ensuring no ticket is missed and response times are dramatically reduced.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a accurate, brand-appropriate reply using context from the ticket and DFC/R1 product knowledge.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket response drafting time from minutes to seconds per ticket, allowing the support team to review and send rather than write from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the AI-generated classification and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket so the support team can review, edit, and send directly from their inbox.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the support team working entirely within HubSpot while accelerating resolution times and improving reply consistency.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form stored in HubSpot, including customer details and issue descriptions.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Consolidates all Amazon customer issue data from one source of truth, eliminating manual exports and ensuring complete data capture.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review, filtering, and trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a live, organized view of customer issues that enables faster root-cause analysis and product quality improvements.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website, flagging high-intent behavior.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces warm buying signals in real time, giving the sales team the context needed to reach out at the perfect moment.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Triggers an automated Teams message and email alert to the relevant sales rep with the customer's name, activity details, and a direct HubSpot link.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables instant sales follow-up on active buyers, reducing response lag from hours to minutes and increasing conversion likelihood.

R1 Customer Agent.action: This agent is currently in development and connections have not yet been finalized.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide automated customer-facing support for R1 Concepts once live, reducing inbound support volume and improving customer self-service.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates prospect discovery that would otherwise require hours of manual research, generating a fresh lead list daily.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates contact email addresses for the identified businesses to enable direct outreach.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Transforms scraped business data into actionable, reachable leads without manual contact lookups.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs enriched leads as contacts in HubSpot and sends a personalized warm intro email about the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Drives daily outreach to qualified local prospects automatically, accelerating the timeline to finding a subtenant.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversion metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Centralizes cross-brand ad performance data for unified analysis, eliminating manual reporting across multiple ad consoles.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data to identify underperforming keywords, budget inefficiencies, and optimization opportunities across both brands.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers actionable ad optimization recommendations that improve ACOS and ROAS without requiring a dedicated paid media analyst.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching the input keywords, retrieving channel data, video metadata, and audience engagement signals.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Surfaces relevant creator candidates at scale across YouTube in seconds, replacing hours of manual channel browsing.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Discovers and retrieves matching Instagram creator profiles based on the same keyword criteria, pulling follower counts and content themes.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator discovery across Instagram simultaneously, providing a multi-platform candidate pool from a single search.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes all discovered creator profiles from YouTube, Instagram, and web sources to assess relevance, audience fit, and content alignment with the brand.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters and ranks creators intelligently so teams spend time only on high-fit candidates, accelerating the shortlisting process.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche relevance, follower quality, and brand safety.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective creator shortlist based on configurable business priorities, removing guesswork from influencer selection.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the qualified creator list and learned outreach sequences, prompts, and campaign briefs stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Centralizes all campaign assets and creator data in one place, ensuring the AI always works from the most current targeting criteria and messaging frameworks.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator by applying learned sequences and prompts to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-quality outreach at scale without manual copywriting, dramatically increasing creator response rates and reducing time-to-contact.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends personalized outreach emails to each qualified creator and tracks delivery status.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates high-volume creator prospecting outreach, eliminating manual sending and enabling the team to contact hundreds of creators simultaneously.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email conversations, negotiation outcomes, and learned response patterns to inform AI reply strategy.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds the AI in real negotiation history so responses reflect proven tactics, deal structures, and tone that have worked with creators previously.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator replies and surfaces the conversation context needed for the AI to generate an appropriate negotiation response.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator reply goes unaddressed and gives the AI full thread context, maintaining conversation continuity without manual monitoring.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the creator's reply against historical negotiation data and generates a contextually appropriate response that advances the deal.
Creator Reponse.impact: Accelerates negotiation cycles by providing instant, informed replies that mirror successful past conversations, reducing back-and-forth time significantly.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Pulls the MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matching part numbers and build the load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual spreadsheet matching each week, producing an accurate, formatted load sheet ready for distribution in seconds.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates a HubSpot email draft with the generated sales sheet and load sheet attachments, then sends to the defined contact list.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Automates the entire weekly MHM email creation and send process, ensuring consistent on-time delivery to sales contacts without manual email building.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a confirmation message to the relevant Teams channel once the email has been successfully created and sent.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps the team instantly informed of campaign completion without anyone needing to check HubSpot, reducing coordination overhead.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling First to Market email copy and monthly recap content based on new product launch data and brand messaging guidelines.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces launch-ready marketing copy instantly, enabling the team to respond to new product availability faster and maintain a consistent brand voice at scale.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates fully structured HubSpot email drafts for each new product launch and monthly recap, with generated content and sales sheet assets embedded.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual email building in HubSpot, saving significant setup time per launch and ensuring each draft is immediately ready for review and send.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period to populate marketing KPIs.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Removes manual HubSpot data exports from the monthly reporting process, ensuring metrics are always current and accurately sourced.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves website traffic, session data, conversion events, and channel performance metrics for the reporting month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automatically surfaces web performance data that previously required manual GA4 exports, saving analyst time and eliminating transcription errors.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Exports SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click-through rates, and revenue attribution for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS performance data automatically, giving a complete channel view without manual platform logins or copy-paste reporting.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck, updating charts, tables, and text placeholders with current data.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Fully automates the most data-intensive section of the monthly deck, reducing deck production time by hours and eliminating manual slide formatting errors.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes R1 Concepts' current keyword rankings and surfaces gaps where competitors outrank them for high-value brake and rotor-related search terms.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Directs content production toward the highest-opportunity keyword gaps, maximizing organic traffic potential from every blog article published.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Writes fully optimized SEO blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured for Yoast SEO compliance and automotive buyer intent.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready, high-quality SEO content at a fraction of the time and cost of manual writing, enabling a consistent content cadence that builds domain authority.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog article with Yoast SEO fields populated including meta title, meta description, focus keyword, and slug.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Eliminates manual WordPress publishing and SEO field configuration, ensuring every post goes live fully optimized and indexed without editor intervention.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open vendor purchase order data including overdue items, quantities, expected delivery dates, and vendor contact details.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Captures all outstanding PO data from the source system automatically, eliminating manual report generation and ensuring no overdue orders are missed.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and enrolling them in the chase email follow-up sequence.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts uploaded MHM vehicle part number lists and the New Availability Guide, then matches part numbers across both datasets in the browser.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives the team an instant, no-login matching tool that works entirely offline, removing dependency on external systems for a critical weekly task.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Exports the matched results as a formatted DFC load sheet Excel file ready for distribution or upload.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Logs into Attentive via Chrome automation, locates the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clones it as the base for the new weekly campaign.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Removes the repetitive manual campaign cloning process in Attentive, saving setup time each week and ensuring structural consistency across all MHM SMS sends.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's MHM vehicle name and sets the correct scheduled send time before saving.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Ensures each weekly SMS campaign is accurately personalized to the featured vehicle and sent on schedule without any manual Attentive interaction from the team.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC customer sales transaction data including order history, product mix, purchase frequency, and account-level revenue.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides a complete, current sales dataset as the foundation for segmentation and targeting, replacing manual report pulls with an automated data feed.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back cohorts based on sales data analysis, then enrolls each segment into the appropriate automated email campaign.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS messages to high-priority customer segments identified in the sales analysis, including reorder reminders and promotional offers.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Adds a high-engagement SMS touchpoint to the sales follow-up strategy, reaching customers on mobile for time-sensitive reorder and win-back messaging.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual checking and ensures the automation triggers instantly when the new session file is ready, removing human delay from the process.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a new hosted download URL.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Produces a fresh, trackable download link ready to swap into the email, ensuring subscribers always receive the correct current week's file.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps the download link with the new URL, and schedules the send for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistently branded weekly email to the full list without any manual design or scheduling effort, saving 30–60 minutes of production time each week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates long-form, keyword-targeted B2B SEO blog content written for DFC's core audiences: shops, distributors, and fleets.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready SEO content at scale without a dedicated copywriter, consistently targeting high-intent search terms to drive organic traffic.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog post and publishes it with proper formatting, meta fields, and category tags.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps the DFC blog consistently populated with indexed, crawlable content that compounds organic search visibility over time.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday video structures, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia, and fetches vehicle background data from Wikipedia to seed the content pipeline.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and asset hunting per video, giving the AI model rich, vehicle-specific context and real visuals before a single word is written.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Uses the scraped vehicle data and reference content to write a complete, structured Friction Friday video script including intro, brake specs breakdown, and call-to-action.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the AI-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a consistent branded voice.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the completed video package assets — script, voiceover file link, thumbnail, and video assembly notes — via Apps Script webhook and logs them to a structured row for review and publishing.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Audits all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows, identifying redundant triggers, gaps in the welcome series, and misconfigured site visit automations.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Exports DFC customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, and account attributes needed for CRM mapping.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates a clean source-of-truth data pull that bridges the ERP and CRM, making downstream sales automations accurate and reliable.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in the planning stage with connections and scope not yet defined.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and average position data for all DFC blog URLs.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves organic traffic sessions, engagement rates, and conversion events attributed to DFC blog content.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword rankings, impressions, and click data for all R1 Concepts blog content.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Gerrit Young drops the monthly new arrivals file into Teams, triggering the agent to begin the distribution workflow.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance data from all three paid ad platforms including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, new assignments, approaching deadlines, or status changes across projects.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting as soon as the meeting concludes.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls live inventory reality in real time, ensuring the catalog output reflects actual stock rather than outdated spreadsheet data.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures the raw inventory query results into a clean, logically organized catalog layout, labeling stocked items and clearly flagging inventory gaps.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Removes the manual effort of formatting and interpreting raw data, producing a polished, decision-ready output Mark can act on immediately.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends Mark a formatted Excel catalog file as an email attachment, containing the full stocked and missing parts breakdown for the requested vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of submission, replacing what could be hours of manual lookup and spreadsheet assembly.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, enriching each line with on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, and in-transit status.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort and eliminating version conflicts.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Receives the enriched inventory data and updates the backorder report with current status columns, flagging any parts with no fulfillment source in a dedicated column.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a live, actionable report that shows exactly where each part stands and which ones are dead ends requiring escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer-facing communications for flagged backorder items, including status updates and estimated resolution timelines where available.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Proactively keeps customers informed without requiring reps to manually draft individual emails, reducing inbound status inquiries and improving customer experience.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles competitor catalog coverage in minutes that would otherwise require hours of manual browsing across three separate websites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which fitments DFC already covers and which represent gaps or opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a clear competitive gap analysis without any manual comparison work, highlighting exactly where DFC is missing coverage versus market leaders.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data and gauge interest in specific two-piece rotor fitments DFC doesn't currently carry.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Passively collects real demand signals from the customer base to inform sourcing decisions, replacing guesswork with data-backed prioritization.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and incoming demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Provides one clean, always-current output Dino can use to make sourcing and catalog expansion decisions without consolidating data from multiple sources manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — across every live campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the complete active ad library in one pull, enabling a comprehensive phrase audit without anyone manually opening individual ads in the platform.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field for the specified target phrases, flags each match, and records the exact ad ID, field name, and matching copy string.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across potentially hundreds of ads in seconds, with precise field-level attribution that makes remediation straightforward.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted report email listing every flagged ad with the specific field and exact copy where each target phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a fully actionable compliance or quality review brief directly to the requester's inbox, ready to forward or act on without any additional formatting.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, identifies emails with and without resume attachments, and triggers the appropriate downstream workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every applicant receives a timely, consistent response and no resume slips through unprocessed, removing manual inbox triage from the recruiting workflow.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured Drive folder organized by role and date, creating a permanent, searchable applicant file record.
Resume Bot.impact: Keeps all applicant documents organized and accessible in one place without anyone manually downloading and filing attachments, saving time and preventing lost files.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume and scores the candidate against the requirements of the relevant open role, producing a structured evaluation and a recommended decision of approve, deny, or pause.
Resume Bot.impact: Cuts initial resume screening time dramatically by delivering a reasoned, consistent score for every applicant, so the hiring team reviews only the most qualified candidates.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant with their score, decision, role, and file link to a central dashboard, and routes paused-role candidates to a dedicated Pending tab for future review.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the recruiting team a live, filterable view of the entire applicant pipeline with zero manual data entry, and ensures paused candidates are never lost or forgotten.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow, now tracking **56 total agents** — 28 Completed, 10 In Progress, and 18 Planned. This week we welcomed one new addition: the **Resume Bot**, which automatically reads incoming resumes from jobs@r1concepts.com, scores candidates against open roles using Claude, files PDFs in Drive, sends auto-replies, and logs everything to a Sheets dashboard — a great example of automation extending beyond marketing into broader ops. No agents changed stages this week, but with 10 builds actively in progress, there's plenty of momentum heading into the weeks ahead. Great work to everyone pushing these projects forward!
